module.name: HTML
module.param:
Explore fields

Cisco provides over 100 fields in the CDR and CMR, but then this app adds many more. Use the form below to learn more about them.

module.name: Search
module.param:
`custom_index` (`cucm_sourcetypes` OR `cube_sourcetypes`) | head 3000 | eval CS_total=if(isnotnull(CS),1,null()) | eval SCS_total=if(isnotnull(SCS),1,null()) | eval CSR_overall=if(isnotnull(CS),1,null()) | eval SCSR_overall=if(isnotnull(SCS),1,null()) | fields - date_* host index sourcetype splunk_server eventtype linecount splunk_server_group tag timeendpos timestartpos cdrRecordType | fieldsummary | append [ | stats count | fields - count | eval field=split("quality CSR_overall CS_total SCSR_overall SCS_total callingPartyAreaCode callingPartyCLLI callingPartyCity callingPartyCompanyName callingPartyCompanyType callingPartyCountry callingPartyCountryCode callingPartyExchange callingPartyLATA callingPartyLat callingPartyLong callingPartyNumberType callingPartyOCN callingPartyState callingPartyStateAbbr callingPartyZip callingSearchSpace concurrency destCidr destIpAddr destSite deviceClassName deviceDescription deviceDirectoryNumber devicePool deviceProtocol deviceSubclassName device_type duration_elapsed duration_total finalCalledPartyAreaCode finalCalledPartyCLLI finalCalledPartyCity finalCalledPartyCompanyName finalCalledPartyCompanyType finalCalledPartyCountry finalCalledPartyCountryCode finalCalledPartyExchange finalCalledPartyLATA finalCalledPartyLat finalCalledPartyLong finalCalledPartyNumberType finalCalledPartyOCN finalCalledPartyState finalCalledPartyStateAbbr finalCalledPartyZip from group initialCalledPartyGroup initialCalledPartyName initialCalledPartyNumber initialCalledPartySubgroup initialCallingPartyGroup initialCallingPartyName initialCallingPartyNumber initialCallingPartySubgroup initial_type internal_party_number ip_addr leg_type legs name origIpAddr origSite productName securityProfile site subgroup terminatingCalledPartyGroup terminatingCalledPartyName terminatingCalledPartyNumber terminatingCalledPartySubgroup terminatingCallingPartyGroup terminatingCallingPartyName terminatingCallingPartyNumber terminatingCallingPartySubgroup to transfers userDepartment userEmail userId userName"," ") | mvexpand field ] | fields field | eval in_data="1" | append [ | inputlookup field_gallery | eval description = replace(description,"\\\"",""") | eval descSentences=split(description,". ") | eval shortDesc=if(mvcount(descSentences)>2,mvjoin(mvindex(descSentences,0,0),". ")+"....",description) | eval expandLinkText=if(mvcount(descSentences)>2,"(expand)","") | fields - descSentences | eval added_by_app=if(match(description,"(added by the app)"),1,0) ] | eval in_data=if(len(replace(field,"_overall",""))",">"),"<", "<") | eval uri = replace(uri,"\"",""") | eval reportPlusDescription = uri + "::::" + reportDescription ] | stats last(description) as description last(shortDesc) as shortDesc last(expandLinkText) as expandLinkText dc(reportPlusDescription) as exampleCount last(areas) as areas values(reportPlusDescription) as reportPlusDescription values(in_data) as in_data values(added_by_app) as added_by_app by field | eval expandExamples = if(exampleCount>0," -- show links to examples (" + exampleCount + ")","") | eval areas=split(areas," ") | eval areas=mvappend(areas,"all") | fillnull reportPlusDescription value="" | mvexpand reportPlusDescription | eval report=mvindex(split(reportPlusDescription,"::::"),0) | eval reportDescription=mvindex(split(reportPlusDescription,"::::"),1) | eval report="
  • " + reportDescription + "
    • " | stats last(description) as description last(shortDesc) as shortDesc last(expandLinkText) as expandLinkText last(expandExamples) as expandExamples values(areas) as areas values(in_data) as in_data values(added_by_app) as added_by_app values(report) as reports values(reportDescription) as reportDescriptions by field | eval reports = "
      " + mvjoin(reports,"") + "
    " | eval reportDescriptions = mvjoin(reportDescriptions, "::::") | eval fieldLower=lower(field) | sort fieldLower | fields - fieldLower

list.param: from the raw CDR and CMR
whether or not they're in my data
that are NOT in my data

module.name: TextField
module.param: ( description="*$value$*" OR field="*$value$*" OR areas="*$value$*" OR reportDescriptions="*$value$*")

module.name: Pulldown
module.param: $postProcess$ | eval areas=mvappend(areas,"all") | mvexpand areas | rename areas as area | stats dc(field) as fields by area | lookup local=true field_areas name AS area OUTPUT label as areaLabel | eval areaLabel=areaLabel + " (" + fields + ")" | sort areaLabel

module.name: Table
module.param: areas description shortDesc expandLinkText expandExamples reports reportDescriptions in_data added_by_app
